---
title: "Statistics Program Advisor"
description: "A RAG chatbot which advices on Statistics undegraduate studies in Greece"

image: ../../../assets/images/class.webp
image-alt: ""

badges:
  - label: Python
    class: bg-primary
  - label: Streamlit
    class: bg-success

appText: "Read article"

links:
  - url: https://stesiam.shinyapps.io/Dev-Wages-App/
    icon: bi-globe
    text: App
    
toc: true
toc-location: left
comments: false
lang: en
order: 2
---


:::{.d-flex .flex-column .flex-sm-row .justify-content-center .gap-3 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .p-2}
```{=html}
<div><a href="#" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i> Εφαρμογή</a></div>
<div><a href="#" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Αποθετήριο</a></div>
<div><a href="#" class="btn btn-primary btn-md"><i class="bi bi-box"></i> Dockerhub</a></div>
```
:::

::: {.text-center .lh-lg}
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> `Programming Language`: R <br>
<i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i> `Tech Stack`: R + Shiny <br>
<i class="bi bi-braces"></i> `Software`: dplyr, tidyr, rvest <br>
<i class="bi bi-database"></i> `Dataset`: World Bank <br>
<i class="bi bi-translate"></i> `Language`:  🇬🇧  / 🇬🇷 <br>
<i class="bi bi-activity"></i> `Status`: Online - Running
:::

## Introduction
